articles.contents:
Home


  Profile


  About

      
  






Muhammad Ahmad Hassan





About Me
I am a final-year BSc (Hons) Economics and Politics student at the
University of Essex. My academic interests focus on understanding how
markets function and how political institutions shape economic
outcomes.
Beyond my studies, I enjoy reading widely to gain new perspectives on
economic and political issues. I also play golf in my free time.

            Bio
            I am a final-year BSc (Hons) Economics and Politics
            student at the University of Essex. My academic interests
            focus on quantitative analysis, political economy, and the
            interaction between markets and institutions.
            Through my studies, I have developed strong skills in
            statistical modelling, data analysis in R, and communicating
            empirical findings clearly and professionally.
            
            
            Education
            University of Essex
            BSc (Hons) Economics and Politics
            September 2023 – May 2026
